Argument Reference

The following arguments are supported:

  • sddc_id - (Required) Changing this field requires replacement.
  • compute_availability_domain - (Required) Changing this field requires replacement.
  • esxi_hosts_count - (Required) Changing this field requires replacement.
  • network_configuration - (Required) (Updatable) Network settings used for future ESXi host additions in the Cluster.
  • display_name - (Optional) (Updatable) A user-friendly display name for the Cluster.
  • instance_display_name_prefix - (Optional) Changing this field requires replacement.
  • initial_commitment - (Optional) Changing this field requires replacement.
  • workload_network_cidr - (Optional) Changing this field requires replacement.
  • initial_host_shape_name - (Optional) Changing this field requires replacement.
  • initial_host_ocpu_count - (Optional) Changing this field requires replacement.
  • is_shielded_instance_enabled - (Optional) Changing this field requires replacement.
  • capacity_reservation_id - (Optional) Changing this field requires replacement.
  • datastores - (Optional) Updating this value after creation is not supported.
  • vmware_software_version - (Optional) (Updatable) The VMware bundle used for future ESXi host additions.
  • esxi_software_version - (Optional) (Updatable) The ESXi bundle used for future ESXi host additions.
  • freeform_tags - (Optional) (Updatable) Free-form tags for this resource.
  • defined_tags - (Optional) (Updatable) Defined tags for this resource.
